entities.name: Sliding Knowledge Threshold
entities.context: V's belief that the minimum viable knowledge threshold for any capability is continuously decreasing due to AI

entities.name: Moore's Law
entities.context: Referenced as an analogy for the rate at which knowledge thresholds are declining

entities.name: AI compression
entities.context: The mechanism V identifies as driving the reduction in required knowledge to take action

entities.name: epistemology
entities.context: The philosophical domain this position belongs to

relationships.context: Moore's Law used as analogy for the sliding threshold pattern
AI compression is the causal mechanism driving the threshold downward
This position is categorized within the epistemology domain
